summary: Frontend testing of Home quick action tiles and Contact detail page action handlers. All core functionality is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: handleQuickAction properly handles all required keys: digitalcard, linkpage, congrats, showcase, review, gift
Action query param auto-trigger is implemented correctly at line 431-435
Action progress tracker onPress handler at line 2251 correctly maps backend keys to frontend action keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home quick action tiles now correctly open contact picker modal instead of generic share modal. Contact detail page handleQuickAction supports all action keys including digitalcard, linkpage, congrats, showcase. The action query param auto-triggers actions on the contact detail page.

home_share_my_card_tile.description: Clicking 'Share My Card' opens contact picker modal with 'Select a contact to send to' text

home_review_link_tile.description: Clicking 'Review Link' opens contact picker modal titled 'Send Review Link'

home_send_card_tile.description: Clicking 'Send a Card' opens contact picker modal titled 'Send a Card'

home_showcase_tile.description: Clicking 'My Showcase' opens contact picker modal titled 'Share Showcase'

contact_selection_navigation.description: Selecting contact from picker navigates to /contact/{id}?action=xxx

action_auto_trigger_digitalcard.description: Contact detail page auto-triggers business card picker modal from ?action=digitalcard query param

action_auto_trigger_showcase.description: Contact detail page auto-triggers showcase link insertion from ?action=showcase query param
action_auto_trigger_showcase.composer_prefilled: Hey Jane! Check out some of our happy customers: https://app.imonsocial.com/showcase/...

action_progress_tracker_contact_card.description: Clicking 'Contact Card' in action progress tracker opens 'Share Your Stuff' modal with VCF, Landing Page, Showcase, Link Page options

code_review_handleQuickAction.description: handleQuickAction switch handles: sms, call, email, review, card, gift, congrats, digitalcard, linkpage, showcase

code_review_action_progress_tracker.description: Action progress tracker onPress maps backend keys correctly: personal_sms→sms, congrats_card_sent→congrats, review_request_sent→review, email_sent→email, link_page_shared→linkpage, digital_card_sent→digitalcard
